'''ât-p-t-t''' ('''kataptetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jacket|jacket]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jacket|jacket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-p-t-t
|-
! Lemma
| kataptetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitaptetoko|thitaptetoko]] || [[word:jitaptetoko|jitaptetoko]] || [[word:shitaptetoko|shitaptetoko]] || [[word:kitaptetoko|kitaptetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutaptetoko|thuthutaptetoko]] || [[word:jujutaptetoko|jujutaptetoko]] || [[word:shushutaptetoko|shushutaptetoko]] || [[word:kukutaptetoko|kukutaptetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutaptetoko|thutaptetoko]] || [[word:jutaptetoko|jutaptetoko]] || [[word:shutaptetoko|shutaptetoko]] || [[word:kutaptetoko|kutaptetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutaptetoko|thutaptetoko]] || [[word:jutaptetoko|jutaptetoko]] || [[word:shutaptetoko|shutaptetoko]] || [[word:kutaptetoko|kutaptetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetaptetoko|thetaptetoko]] || [[word:jetaptetoko|jetaptetoko]] || [[word:shetaptetoko|shetaptetoko]] || [[word:ketaptetoko|ketaptetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotaptetoko|thothotaptetoko]] || [[word:jojotaptetoko|jojotaptetoko]] || [[word:shoshotaptetoko|shoshotaptetoko]] || [[word:kokotaptetoko|kokotaptetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotaptetoko|thotaptetoko]] || [[word:jotaptetoko|jotaptetoko]] || [[word:shotaptetoko|shotaptetoko]] || [[word:kotaptetoko|kotaptetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotaptetoko|thotaptetoko]] || [[word:jotaptetoko|jotaptetoko]] || [[word:shotaptetoko|shotaptetoko]] || [[word:kotaptetoko|kotaptetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtaptetoko|thĂŠtaptetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtaptetoko|jĂŠtaptetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtaptetoko|shĂŠtaptetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtaptetoko|kĂŠtaptetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathataptetoko|thathataptetoko]] || [[word:jajataptetoko|jajataptetoko]] || [[word:shashataptetoko|shashataptetoko]] || [[word:kakataptetoko|kakataptetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thataptetoko|thataptetoko]] || [[word:jataptetoko|jataptetoko]] || [[word:shataptetoko|shataptetoko]] || [[word:kataptetoko|kataptetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thataptetoko|thataptetoko]] || [[word:jataptetoko|jataptetoko]] || [[word:shataptetoko|shataptetoko]] || [[word:kataptetoko|kataptetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
